compiled_state.title: Write RED tests for real git version check

compiled_state.description: Extend tests/unit/scripts/test-apply-attribution-trailers.sh with four named functions: test_check_git_version_fails_when_version_is_1_9() (GIT_BINARY mocked to output 'git version 1.9.0'; check_git_version returns non-zero AND stderr contains TRAILER_SKIPPED), test_check_git_version_passes_when_version_is_2_6() (mock 2.6.0; returns 0), test_check_git_version_passes_when_version_is_2_42() (mock 2.42.0; returns 0), test_check_git_version_passes_with_vendor_suffix() (mock '2.39.3-1.el9'; returns 0). Create mock: printf '#!/bin/bash\necho "git version X.Y.Z"\n' > /tmp/fake-git; chmod +x /tmp/fake-git; GIT_BINARY=/tmp/fake-git. test_check_git_version_fails_when_version_is_1_9 FAILS (RED) against current stub. TDD exemption: test-writing task.
